pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. It’s a bit intense being in a room with everyone competing for the same pot, isn't it? What's your name, and how are you holding up?
Hey A, I'm H. It definitely is intense! I'm doing alright, just trying to stay focused. What brings you here?
Honestly, I'm just looking to win for the people I care about back home; a bit of extra cash would change a lot for us. What about you, what's your drive?
I’m in the same boat, honestly. I've got people back home counting on me too, and I’m determined to win this for them.
It definitely puts things into perspective when others are counting on you. Have you had a chance to talk to many of the others yet, or are you keeping to yourself?
I’ve spoken to a couple of people, but I'm mostly just trying to get a feel for the room. What about you, have you met anyone interesting yet?
I've chatted with a few. Everyone seems to have that same look in their eye—pretty determined. It’s a bit of a reality check on how much we all want this.
Yeah, it’s a bit daunting seeing that same drive in everyone else. Makes you wonder how things will go once the money is actually on the line.
That’s the real test, isn't it? I’m hoping we can all stay decent, but I know how much is at stake for everyone here.
Exactly. It's easy to stay decent when there's no money on the table, but we'll see what happens when the game starts. Good luck, A.
I hear you. Let's hope for the best, but I'm ready for whatever comes next. Good luck to you too, H.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share.
I agree, it was a successful outcome for both of us. It's good that we were able to maintain the fair split.
